programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. Find out what strategies Coach Jesse has for Ryan to help him get scholarship offers and follow them on their shooting adventure as they compete to see who’s the fastest shot in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.desc: Hunting has a way of grounding us, reminding us of what truly matters: shared moments and unforgettable memories. Chance and Ashleigh Eckert are on their first out-of-state hunt in the rolling hills of Ohio. After overcoming a life-changing kidney transplant, their story is one of faith, love, and resilience. While the goal was a big buck, the true reward was the time spent together and the lessons learned along the way. Because hunting is about so much more than the harvest — it’s about the journey.

programme.title: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
programme.desc: Paul, Perry, and Dan head east of Timmins to the historic waters of Frederick House Lake for a late-season ice adventure under warm, spring-like skies. What starts as a perfect day on the hardwater quickly turns into a multispecies showcase—pike, perch, walleye, and sauger all keep the crew busy as the bite fires up. But as Northern Ontario weather often reminds us, conditions shift fast. With the wind picking up and clouds rolling in, the team wraps up an incredible day and makes their way home, grateful for one more memorable outing before the thaw.

programme.title: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake

This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. Find out what strategies Coach Jesse has for Ryan to help him get scholarship offers and follow them on their shooting adventure as they compete to see who’s the fastest shot in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: Paul Carcaterra visits Durham, N.C. to meet with the biggest name in the sport of lacrosse: Duke attackman Brennan O'Neill. The No. 1 pick in the 2024 PLL Draft already has a Tewaaraton Award and an MVP of Team USA under his belt. This episode of THROUGH X will dive into his mindset and discover what's driving him in his final year on campus. Paul Carcaterra also visits South Bend, Indiana to learn from one of the best brother-duos in the history of lacrosse.

programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary
programme.desc: Coach Bill Tierney is a legend. Over his five decade coaching career, he's accomplished almost everything: NCAA Championships, Coach of the Year honors, induction into the Hall of Fame. The last accomplishment left for his resume? A PLL Championship. Philadelphia finished 2-8 in Coach Tierney's inaugural year at the helm. Now in his second season, Tierney is aiming to right the ship and has his sights on one more ring.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 21 (Season 3) of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon. It's a double interview episode, as the crew welcomes both Maryland Whipsnakes attackman Rob Pannell to talk about breaking the career points record and new Fairfield Stags head coach John Odierna following the PLL weekend in Connecticut. Kev ranks his top five PLL cover defenders, and Hoagie sets expectations for lacrosse legend Casey Powell as a new D1 head coach at Le Moyne. Editor

programme.title: S1E5 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto
programme.desc: Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa on the adventure of a lifetime as they explore the vibrant cities and stunning beaches of Morocco. Plus, enjoy exclusive bonus footage featuring the very best of GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S3E1 Moto
programme.desc: GoPro Athlete and Formula 1 star Daniel Ricciardo teams up with Race Service Co-Founder James Kirkham for an unforgettable ride through Los Angeles. With eight Grand Prix victories and 32 podiums to his name, the Honey Badger spends his day off behind the wheel of supercars like the Ford GT, racing past Beverly Hills, the Sunset Strip, and into the winding roads of Benedict Canyon. Plus, enjoy even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions (1961)
programme.desc: A gunslinger accidentally kills a dance hall girl's son and, consumed by guilt, vows to escort her across dangerous Apache territory to bury the boy in his father’s grave

programme.title: The Desperate Mission 1969
programme.desc: In The Desperate Mission, Ricardo Montalbán stars as the legendary Joaquin Murrieta, the Mexican folk hero branded an outlaw by those who stole his land and destroyed his family. With a price on his head, he leads a daring fight against corruption, injustice, and betrayal across the California frontier. Filled with adventure, romance, and rebellion, this made-for-TV Western brings the legend of Murrieta to life with passion and fire.

programme.title: Enemy of the Law
programme.desc: To get the money hidden by Gray before he was caught, the Rangers send Perkins to prison to become his friend. When the two get out, Perkins is unaware that Gray has printed the map to the loot on the bottom of his foot.

programme.title: The Dawn Rider
programme.desc: Just as John travels to visit his father, he witnesses his death and suffers a gun wound - a beautiful woman is kind enough to help him bring the killers to justice, but jealousy from another man may cause problems.

programme.title: Django, Kill!
programme.desc: Various factions, including a half-breed bandit, a gang of homosexual cowboys, and a priest, feud over stolen gold in a surreal town.

programme.title: Sheriff Of Tombstone 1941
programme.desc: Roy Rogers brings law and order to the Old West in Sheriff of Tombstone! Sent to clean up the infamous frontier town, Rogers finds himself facing a crooked mayor and a gang of outlaws determined to run things their way. With the help of loyal allies and a song or two along the trail, he fights for justice and wins the hearts of the townsfolk. Packed with action, music, and Western spirit, it’s Roy at his heroic best.
